attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 31 (7d8) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The chuul makes two Pincer attacks and uses Paralyzing Tentacles.

attacks.name: Pincer
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of two pincers.

attacks.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature Grappled by the chuul. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The chuul can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sense Magic
traits.text: The chuul senses magic within 120 feet of itself. This trait otherwise works like the Detect Magic spell but isn't itself magical.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The golem makes two Slam attacks, or it makes three Slam attacks if it used Hasten this turn.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. 10 (1d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 6 (1d12) Acid damage, and the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Acid damage taken.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Hasten (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The golem takes the Dash and Disengage actions.

traits.name: Acid Absorption
traits.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Acid damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Acid damage dealt.

traits.name: Berserk
traits.text: Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it continues to be berserk until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.text: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The cloaker makes one Attach attack and two Tail attacks.

attacks.name: Attach
attacks.detail:
Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 13 (3d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the cloaker attaches to it. While the cloaker is attached, the target has the Blinded condition, and the cloaker can't make Attach attacks against other targets. In addition, the cloaker halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage.
The cloaker can detach itself by spending 5 feet of movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can take an action to try to detach the cloaker, doing so by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength (Athletics) check.

attacks.name: Tail
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Moan
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Emanation originating from the cloaker. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the cloaker's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this cloaker's Moan for the next 24 hours.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Phantasms (Recharge after a Short or Long Rest)
attacks.detail: The cloaker casts the Mirror Image spell, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability. The spell ends early if the cloaker starts or ends its turn in Bright Light.

traits.name: Light Sensitivity
traits.text: While in Bright Light, the cloaker has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The giant makes two attacks, using Thunderous Mace or Thundercloud in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Fog Cloud.

attacks.name: Thunderous Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. 21 (3d8 + 8) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Thunder damage.

attacks.name: Thundercloud
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +12, range 240 ft. 18 (3d6 + 8) Thunder damage, and the target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Fog Cloud, Light
- 1e/Day Each: Control Weather, Gaseous Form, Telekinesis

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Misty Step
attacks.detail: The giant casts the Misty Step spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Petrifying Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11. First Failure The target has the Restrained condition. The target repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure The target has the Petrified condition, instead of the Restrained condition, for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Club
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Training
traits.text: The commoner has proficiency in one skill of the DM's choice and has Advantage whenever it makes an ability check using that skill.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Acid Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 20-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 18 (4d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Slowing Breath
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target can't take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 11 (1d12 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the couatl's next turn.

attacks.name: Constrict
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature the couatl can see within 5 feet. Failure: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Shapechange
- 1e/Day Each: Create Food and Water, Dream, Greater Restoration, Scrying, Sleep

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (2/Day)
attacks.detail: The couatl casts Bless, Lesser Restoration, or Sanctuary, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Shielded Mind
traits.text: The couatl's thoughts can't be read by any means, and other creatures can communicate with it telepathically only if it allows them.

attacks.name: Pact Blade
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks):
- At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy
- 1/Day Each: Hold Person
- 2/Day Each: Command

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Spiritual Weapon (2/Day)
attacks.detail: The cultist casts the Spiritual Weapon spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Ritual Sickle
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 1 Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Crush
attacks.detail:
Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage, and the darkmantle attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the darkmantle had Advantage on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the Blinded condition and is suffocating while the darkmantle is attached in this way.
While attached to a target, the darkmantle can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target.
A creature can take an action to try to detach the darkmantle from itself, doing so with a successful DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. On its turn, the darkmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

attacks.name: Darkness Aura (1/Day)
attacks.detail: Magical darkness fills a 15-foot Emanation originating from the darkmantle. This effect lasts while the darkmantle maintains Concentration on it, up to 10 minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The death dog makes two Bite attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. First Failure The target has the Poisoned condition. While Poisoned, the target's Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and it repeats the save every 24 hours that elapse, ending the effect on itself on a success. Subsequent Failures: The Poisoned target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 (1d10).

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The deva makes two Holy Mace attacks.

attacks.name: Holy Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The deva casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Shapechange
- 1e/Day Each: Commune, Raise Dead

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (2/Day)
attacks.detail: The deva casts Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
traits.text: If the deva dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The deva has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Bolt in any combination.

attacks.name: Storm Blade
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 feet. 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage.

attacks.name: Storm Bolt
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 120 feet. 13 (3d8) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Create Whirlwind
attacks.detail:
The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's Concentration on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns.
Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. Strength Saving Throw: DC 17 (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). Failure: While in the whirlwind, the target has the Restrained condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the Restrained target takes 21 (6d6) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic
- 2e/Day Each: Create Food and Water, Tongues, Wind Walk
- 1e/Day Each: Creation, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
traits.text: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Air.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The djinni has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Wishes
traits.text: The djinni has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the djinni knows it, the djinni can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Unsettling Visage (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

attacks.name: Read Thoughts
attacks.detail:
The doppelganger casts Detect Thoughts, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12).
- At Will: Detect Thoughts

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The dragon makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. 23 (3d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

attacks.name: Tail
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. 18 (2d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Steam Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Fetid Cloud (1/Day)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the dretch. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The drider makes three attacks, using Foreleg or Poison Burst in any combination.

attacks.name: Foreleg
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Poison Burst
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 120 ft. 13 (3d6 + 3) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Magic of the Spider Queen (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The drider casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Web, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the drider has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the drider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The druid makes two attacks, using Vine Staff or Verdant Wisp in any combination.

attacks.name: Vine Staff
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Verdant Wisp
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 90 ft. 10 (3d6) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The druid casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
- At Will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals
- 2e/Day Each: Entangle, Thunderwave
- 1e/Day Each: Animal Messenger, Longstrider, Moonbeam

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The dryad makes one Vine Lash or Thorn Burst attack, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Charm Monster.

attacks.name: Vine Lash
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Thorn Burst
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 60 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
- At Will: Animal Friendship, Charm Monster, Druidcraft
- 1e/Day Each: Entangle, Pass without Trace

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Tree Stride
attacks.detail: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, the dryad teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The dryad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
traits.text: The dryad can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Blinding Breath (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mephit's next turn.

attacks.name: Sleep (1/Day)
attacks.detail:
The mephit casts the Sleep spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).
- At Will:
- 1/Day Each: Sleep

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.text: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The elemental makes two attacks, using Slam or Rock Launch in any combination.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Rock Launch
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 60 ft. 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

traits.name: Earth Glide
traits.text: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The efreeti makes three attacks, using Heated Blade or Hurl Flame in any combination.

attacks.name: Heated Blade
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 13 (2d12) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Hurl Flame
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 120 ft. 24 (7d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The efreeti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Elementalism
- 1e/Day Each: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Fire

traits.name: Elemental Restoration
traits.text: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into ash, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The efreeti has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Wishes
traits.text: The efreeti has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the efreeti knows it, the efreeti can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the efreeti can understand. If the efreeti casts the spell for the creature, the efreeti suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the efreeti has cast it three times, the efreeti can't do so again for 365 days.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The erinyes makes three Withering Sword attacks and can use Entangling Rope.

attacks.name: Withering Sword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Entangling Rope (Requires Magic Rope)
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the erinyes can see within 120 feet. Failure: 14 (4d6) Force damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the rope is destroyed, the erinyes uses a Bonus Action to release the target, or the erinyes uses Entangling Rope again.

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
traits.text: If the erinyes dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The erinyes has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Magic Rope
traits.text: The erinyes has a magic rope. While bearing it, the erinyes can use the Entangling Rope action. The rope has AC 20, HP 90, and Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points, if it is 5+ feet away from the erinyes for 1 hour or more, or if the erinyes dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the erinyes can fully restore it when finishing a Short Rest|XPHB|Short or Long Rest.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The ettercap makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the ettercap's next turn.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Web Strand (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, one Large or smaller creature the ettercap can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Reel
attacks.detail: The ettercap pulls one creature within 30 feet of itself that is Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet straight toward itself.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the ettercap knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The ettin makes one Battleaxe attack and one Morningstar attack.

attacks.name: Battleaxe
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Morningstar
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The elemental makes two Burn attacks.

attacks.name: Burn
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning.

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.text: At the end of each of the elemental's turns, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the elemental takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage. Creatures and flammable objects in the Emanation start Hitazard burning.

traits.name: Fire Form
traits.text: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The elemental sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

traits.name: Water Susceptibility
traits.text: The elemental takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage for every 5 feet the elemental moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The giant makes two attacks, using Flame Sword or Hammer Throw in any combination.

attacks.name: Flame Sword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. 21 (4d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Hammer Throw
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +11, range 60/240 ft. 23 (3d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Fire damage, and the target is pushed up to 15 feet straight away from the giant and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The golem makes two Slam attacks.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Lightning damage.

traits.name: Aversion to Fire
traits.text: If the golem takes Fire damage, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Berserk
traits.text:
Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied.
The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still Bloodied.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.text: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Lightning Absorption
traits.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The giant makes two attacks, using Frost Axe or Great Bow in any combination.

attacks.name: Frost Axe
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. 19 (2d12 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

attacks.name: Great Bow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 150/600 ft. 17 (2d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: War Cry (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The giant or one creature of its choice that can see or hear it gains 16 (2d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points and has Advantage on attack rolls until the start of the giant's next turn.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The gargoyle makes two Claw attacks.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The gargoyle doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

attacks.name: Pseudopod
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

attacks.name: Engulf
attacks.detail: The cube moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube trait). Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. Failure: 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the Restrained condition, and takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. Success: Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.

traits.name: Ooze Cube
traits.text:
The cube fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has Disadvantage on the saving throw.
Creatures inside the cube have Cover|XPHB|Total Cover, and the cube can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time.
As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check, and the puller takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage.

traits.name: Transparent
traits.text: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a non-Undead creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Stench
traits.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the ghast. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The ghost makes two Withering Touch attacks.

attacks.name: Withering Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 19 (3d10 + 3) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Horrific Visage
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Cone that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. Failure: 10 (2d6 + 3) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Possession (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail:
Charisma Saving Throw: DC 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. Failure: The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers.
The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the ghost leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Etherealness
attacks.detail:
The ghost casts the Etherealness spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.
- At Will: Etherealness

traits.name: Ethereal Sight
traits.text: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The ghoul makes two Bite attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d6) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. The target dies if it is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack. Its body is then absorbed into the mouther, leaving only equipment behind.

attacks.name: Blinding Spittle (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 10-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere centered on a point within 30 feet. Failure: 7 (2d6) Radiant damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mouther's next turn.

traits.name: Aberrant Ground
traits.text: The ground in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the mouther is Difficult Terrain.

traits.name: Gibbering
traits.text:
The mouther babbles incoherently while it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, any creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the mouther while it is babbling. Failure: The target rolls 1d8 to determine what it does during the current turn:
- 1-4: The target does nothing.
- 5-6: The target takes no action or Bonus Action and uses all its movement to move in a random direction.
- 7-8: The target makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the glabrezu dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The glabrezu has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.detail: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

attacks.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 22 (4d10) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Weakening Breath
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Test and subtracts 2 (1d4) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. 18 (2d12 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the gorgon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Petrifying Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. First Failure The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Trample
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. Failure: 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Pseudopod
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d8 + 1) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.text: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Corrosive Form
traits.text:
Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the ooze and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the ooze and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon.
The ooze can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal or wood in 1 round.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. 17 (2d12 + 4) Piercing damage plus 22 (4d10) Poison damage.

traits.name: Draconic Origin
traits.text: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (DM's choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

attacks.name: Luring Song
attacks.detail: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's Concentration ends on it. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot Emanation originating from the harpy when the song starts. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While Charmed, the target has the Incapacitated condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attacks; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. Success: The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Greatsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Longbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 150/600 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

traits.name: Aura of Authority
traits.text: While in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

attacks.name: Longsword

Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the homunculus's next turn. Failure by 5 or More: The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. While Poisoned, the target has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes any damage.

traits.name: Telepathic Bond
traits.text: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, the two of them can communicate telepathically with each other.

While wounded, the target loses 10 (3d6) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 17 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration

traits.text: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies. The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 Hit Points when it grows new heads.

traits.name: Reactive Heads
traits.text: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra Reaction that can be used only for Opportunity Attacks.

Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a Bonus Action or Reaction, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. attacks.name: Sting
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

attacks.name: Invisibility
attacks.detail:
The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
- At Will: Invisibility

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

attacks.name: Restless Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
- At Will: Disguise Self, Etherealness
- 1e/Day Each: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Nightmare (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the incubus can see within 60 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Unconscious condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes 18 (4d8) Psychic damage.

traits.name: Succubus Form
traits.text: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The stalker makes three Wind Swipe attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Vortex.

attacks.name: Wind Swipe
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

attacks.name: Vortex
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker's space. Failure: 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker's turns.

traits.name: Air Form
traits.text: The stalker can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Invisibility
traits.text: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

attacks.name: Bladed Arm
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Fiery Bolt
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 120 ft. 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

traits.name: Fire Absorption
traits.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.text: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The knight makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Heavy Crossbow in any combination.

attacks.name: Greatsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Heavy Crossbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +2, range 100/400 ft. 11 (2d10) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Dagger
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The kobold has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the kobold has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

attacks.name: Tentacle
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +17, reach 30 ft. 24 (4d6 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Fling
attacks.detail: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature Grappled by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

attacks.name: Lightning Strike
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. Failure: 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Swallow
attacks.detail:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.
If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Storm Bolt
attacks.detail: The kraken uses Lightning Strike.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Toxic Ink
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the kraken while it is underwater. Failure: The target has the Blinded and Poisoned conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its Speed. Failure or Success: The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The kraken can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The lamia makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Corrupting Touch.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Psychic damage.

attacks.name: Corrupting Touch
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the lamia can see within 5 feet. Failure: 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has the Charmed and Poisoned conditions.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The lamia casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
- At Will: Disguise Self, Minor Illusion
- 1e/Day Each: Geas, Major Image, Scrying

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Leap
attacks.detail: The lamia jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

attacks.name: Vile Slime
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

traits.name: Hellish Restoration
traits.text: If the lemure dies in the Nine Hells, it revives with all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless it is killed by a creature under the effects of a Bless spell or its remains are sprinkled with Holy Water.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The lich makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination.

attacks.name: Eldritch Burst
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

attacks.name: Paralyzing Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. 15 (3d6 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of the lich's next turn.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The lich casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fireball, Invisibility, Lightning Bolt, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
- 2e/Day Each: Animate Dead, Dimension Door, Plane Shift
- 1e/Day Each: Chain Lightning, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying

attacks.name: Reaction: Protective Magic
attacks.detail: The lich casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Deathly Teleport
attacks.detail: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Disrupt Life
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature that isn't an Undead in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the lich. Failure: 31 (9d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Frightening Gaze
attacks.detail: The lich casts Fear, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Spirit Jar
traits.text: If destroyed, the lich reforms in 1d10 days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The mage makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

attacks.name: Arcane Burst
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 16 (3d8 + 3) Force damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Light, Mage Armor, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
- 2e/Day Each: Fireball, Invisibility
- 1e/Day Each: Cone of Cold, Fly

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Misty Step (3/Day)
attacks.detail: The mage casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Reaction: Protective Magic (3/Day)
attacks.detail: The mage casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.text: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d4 + 2) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Ignited Illumination
attacks.detail: The magmin sets itself ablaze or extinguishes its flames. While ablaze, the magmin sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.text: The magmin explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the magmin. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The manticore makes three attacks, using Rend or Tail Spike in any combination.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Tail Spike
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 100/200 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The marilith makes six Pact Blade attacks and uses Constrict.

attacks.name: Pact Blade
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. 10 (1d10 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Constrict
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 17, one Medium or smaller creature the marilith can see within 5 feet. Failure: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Teleport (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The marilith teleports up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the marilith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The marilith has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reactive
traits.text: The marilith can take one Reaction on every turn of combat.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The medusa makes two Claw attacks and one Snake Hair attack, or it makes three Poison Ray attacks.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Snake Hair
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Poison Ray
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 150 ft. 11 (2d8 + 2) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Petrifying Gaze (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. If the medusa sees its reflection in the Cone, the medusa must make this save. First Failure The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

attacks.name: Ocean Spear
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 3 (1d6) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage. If the target is a creature, its Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn. HitomThe spear magically returns to the merfolk's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The merrow makes two attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Harpoon in any combination.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the merrow's next turn.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Harpoon
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the merrow pulls the target up to 15 feet straight toward itself.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The merrow can breathe air and water.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the mimic), reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage—or 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage if the target is Grappled by the mimic—plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage.

attacks.name: Pseudopod
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The mimic shape-shifts to resemble a Medium or Small object while retaining its game statistics, or it returns to its true blob form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
traits.text: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

attacks.name: Abyssal Glaive
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. 10 (1d12 + 4) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Gore (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 18 (4d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the minotaur moved 10+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Gore
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the skeleton moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack, and it uses Dreadful Glare.

attacks.name: Rotting Fist
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, it gains no benefit from finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

attacks.name: Channel Negative Energy
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 60 ft. 25 (6d6 + 4) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Dreadful Glare
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: 25 (6d6 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of the mummy's next turn.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The mummy casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks):
- At Will: Dispel Magic, Thaumaturgy
- 1e/Day Each: Animate Dead, Harm, Insect Plague

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Glare
attacks.detail: The mummy uses Dreadful Glare. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Necrotic Strike
attacks.detail: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Dread Command
attacks.detail: The mummy casts Command (level 2 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the mummy fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The mummy has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Undead Restoration
traits.text: If destroyed, the mummy gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the mummy's lair. The heart is a Tiny object that has AC 17, HP 10, and Immunity to all damage except Fire.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The mummy makes two Rotting Fist attacks and uses Dreadful Glare.

attacks.name: Rotting Fist
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, its Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

attacks.name: Dreadful Glare
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the mummy's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this mummy's Dreadful Glare for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The nalfeshnee makes three Rend attacks.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Force damage.

attacks.name: Teleport
attacks.detail: The nalfeshnee teleports up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Horror Nimbus (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the nalfeshnee. Failure: 28 (8d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition for 1 minute, until it takes damage, or until it ends its turn with the nalfeshnee out of line of sight. Success: The target is immune to this nalfeshnee's Horror Nimbus for 24 hours.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the nalfeshnee dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The nalfeshnee has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The hag makes two Claw attacks.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Etherealness, Magic Missile
- 2e/Day Each: Phantasmal Killer, Plane Shift

attacks.name: Nightmare Haunting (1/Day; Requires Soul Bag)
attacks.detail:
While on the Ethereal Plane, the hag casts Dream, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. Only the hag can serve as the spell's messenger, and the target must be a creature the hag can see on the Material Plane. The spell fails and is wasted if the target is under the effect of the Protection from Evil and Good spell or within a Magic Circle spell.
If the target takes damage from the Dream spell, the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to that damage. If the spell kills the target, its soul is trapped in the hag's soul bag, and the target can't be raised from the dead until its soul is released.
- At Will:
- 1/Day Each: Dream, Protection from Evil and Good, Magic Circle

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The hag shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The hag has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Soul Bag
traits.text:
The hag has a soul bag. While holding or carrying the bag, the hag can use its Nightmare Haunting action.
The bag has AC 15, HP 20, and Resistance to all damage. The bag turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points. If the bag is destroyed, any souls the bag is holding are released. The hag can create a new bag after 7 days.

attacks.name: Hooves
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Ethereal Stride
attacks.detail: The nightmare and up to three willing creatures within 5 feet of it teleport to the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane or vice versa.

traits.name: Confer Fire Resistance
traits.text: The nightmare can grant Resistance to Fire damage to a rider while it is on the nightmare.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The nightmare sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

attacks.name: Rapier
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Pseudopod
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.text: The jelly can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The jelly can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attacks.name: Greatclub
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Javelin
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.text: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The oni makes two Claw or Nightmare Ray attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 10 (1d12 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Nightmare Ray
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 60 ft. 9 (2d6 + 2) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the oni's next turn.

attacks.name: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The oni shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Large Giant, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The oni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
- At Will:
- 1e/Day Each: Charm Person, Darkness, Gaseous Form, Sleep

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Invisibility
attacks.detail: The oni casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.text: The oni regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The otyugh makes one Bite attack and two Tentacle attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition. Whenever the Poisoned target finishes a Long Rest, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15. Failure: The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 (1d10) and doesn't return to normal until the Poisoned condition ends on the target. Success: The Poisoned condition ends.

attacks.name: Tentacle
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from one of two tentacles.

attacks.name: Tentacle Slam
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature Grappled by the otyugh. Failure: 16 (3d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the start of the otyugh's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The owlbear makes two Rend attacks.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Hooves
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The spider makes two Bite attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the target becomes Stable, and it has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. While Poisoned, the target also has the Paralyzed condition.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Ethereal Jaunt
attacks.detail: The spider teleports from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane or vice versa.

traits.name: Ethereal Sight
traits.text: The spider can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane while on the Material Plane and vice versa.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The pirate makes three attacks, using Rapier or Pistol in any combination.

attacks.name: Rapier
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage, and the pirate has Advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of this turn.

attacks.name: Pistol
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 30/90 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Captain's Charm
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 14, one creature the pirate can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the start of the pirate's next turn.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The pirate makes two Dagger attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Enthralling Panache.

attacks.name: Dagger
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Enthralling Panache
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the pirate can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the start of the pirate's next turn.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The pit fiend makes one Bite attack, two Devilish Claw attacks, and one Fiery Mace attack.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 18 (3d6 + 8) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make the following saving throw. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 21. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points and takes 21 (6d6) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

attacks.name: Devilish Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 26 (4d8 + 8) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Fiery Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 22 (4d6 + 8) Force damage plus 21 (6d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Hellfire Spellcasting (Recharge 4-6)
attacks.detail:
The pit fiend casts Fireball (level 5 version) twice, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 21). It can replace one Fireball with Hold Monster (level 7 version) or Wall of Fire.
- At Will:

traits.name: Diabolical Restoration
traits.text: If the pit fiend dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

traits.name: Fear Aura
traits.text: The pit fiend emanates an aura in a 20-foot Emanation while it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 21, any enemy that starts its turn in the aura. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this pit fiend's aura for 24 hours.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
traits.text: If the pit fiend fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The pit fiend has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The planetar makes three Radiant Sword attacks or uses Holy Burst twice.

attacks.name: Radiant Sword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. 14 (2d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Holy Burst
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 20, each enemy in a 20-foot-radius Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere centered on a point the planetar can see within 120 feet. Failure: 24 (7d6) Radiant damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The planetar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good
- 1e/Day Each: Commune, Control Weather, Dispel Evil and Good, Raise Dead

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (2/Day)
attacks.detail: The planetar casts Cure Wounds, Invisibility, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

traits.name: Divine Awareness
traits.text: The planetar knows if it hears a lie.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
traits.text: If the planetar dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The planetar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Radiant Flame
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 60 ft. 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
- At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (1/Day)
attacks.detail: The priest casts Bless, Healing Word, or Sanctuary, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The priest makes two attacks, using Mace or Radiant Flame in any combination.

attacks.name: Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Radiant Flame
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 60 ft. 11 (2d10) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:
- At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy
- 1/Day Each: Spirit Guardians

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (3/Day)
attacks.detail: The priest casts Bless, Dispel Magic, Healing Word, or Lesser Restoration, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The pseudodragon makes two Bite attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Sting
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the pseudodragon can see within 5 feet. Failure: 5 (2d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. Failure by 5 or More: While Poisoned, the target also has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The pseudodragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The worm makes one Bite attack and one Tail Stinger attack.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 22 (3d8 + 9) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Tail Stinger
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 16 (2d6 + 9) Piercing damage plus 35 (10d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Swallow
attacks.detail:
Strength Saving Throw: DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the worm (it can have up to three creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: The target is swallowed by the worm, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the worm, and takes 17 (5d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the worm's turns.
If the worm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the worm must succeed on a DC 21 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the worm and has the Prone condition. If the worm dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.name: Tunneler
