traits.text: The worm can burrow through solid rock at half its Burrow Speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the quasit's next turn.

attacks.name: Scare (1/Day)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 20 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

attacks.name: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The quasit shape-shifts to resemble a bat (Speed 10 ft., Fly 40 ft.), a centipede (40 ft., Climb 40 ft.), or a toad (40 ft., Swim 40 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

attacks.name: Invisibility
attacks.detail:
The quasit casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
- At Will: Invisibility

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The quasit has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The rakshasa makes three Cursed Touch attacks.

attacks.name: Cursed Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 19 (3d12) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a Short Rest|XPHB|Short or Long Rest.

attacks.name: Baleful Command (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 18, each enemy in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the rakshasa. Failure: 28 (8d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened and Incapacitated conditions until the start of the rakshasa's next turn.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The rakshasa casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion
- 1e/Day Each: Fly, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift

traits.name: Greater Magic Resistance
traits.text: The rakshasa automatically succeeds on saving throws against spells and other magical effects, and the attack rolls of spells automatically miss it. Without the rakshasa's permission, no spell can observe the rakshasa remotely or detect its thoughts, creature type, or alignment.

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
traits.text: If the rakshasa dies outside the Nine Hells, its body turns to ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 24 (7d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Fire damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 17), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Swallow
attacks.detail:
Strength Saving Throw: DC 19, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the remorhaz (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: The target is swallowed by the remorhaz, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, it has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the remorhaz, and it takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage at the start of each of the remorhaz's turns.
If the remorhaz takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 5 feet of the remorhaz and has the Prone condition. If the remorhaz dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

traits.name: Heat Aura
traits.text: At the end of each of the remorhaz's turns, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the remorhaz takes 16 (3d10) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The roc makes two Beak attacks. It can replace one attack with a Talons attack.

attacks.name: Beak
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 10 ft. 28 (3d12 + 9) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Talons
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 5 ft. 23 (4d6 + 9) Slashing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 19) from both talons, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Swoop (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: If the roc has a creature Grappled, the roc flies up to half its Fly Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks and drops that creature.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The roper makes two Tentacle attacks, uses Reel, and makes two Bite attacks.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 17 (3d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Tentacle
attacks.detail:
Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 60 ft. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of six tentacles, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the grapple ends.
The tentacle can be damaged, freeing a creature it has Grappled when destroyed (AC 20, HP 10, Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage). Damaging the tentacle deals no damage to the roper, and a destroyed tentacle regrows at the start of the roper's next turn.

attacks.name: Reel
attacks.detail: The roper pulls each creature Grappled by it up to 30 feet straight toward it.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The rust monster makes one Bite attack and uses Antennae twice.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Antennae
attacks.detail: The rust monster targets one nonmagical metal object—armor or a weapon—worn or carried by a creature within 5 feet of itself. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, the creature with the object. Failure: The object takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers (armor) or to its attack rolls (weapon). Armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10, and a weapon is destroyed if its penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor or weapon.

attacks.name: Destroy Metal
attacks.detail: The rust monster touches a nonmagical metal object within 5 feet of itself that isn't being worn or carried. The touch destroys a 1-foot Cube [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cube of the object.

traits.name: Iron Scent
traits.text: The rust monster can pinpoint the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of itself.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The sahuagin makes two Claw attacks.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Aquatic Charge
attacks.detail: The sahuagin swims up to its Swim Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
traits.text: The sahuagin has Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its Hit Points.

traits.name: Limited Amphibiousness
traits.text: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it must be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating outside water.

traits.name: Shark Telepathy
traits.text: The sahuagin can magically control sharks within 120 feet of itself, using a special telepathy.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The salamander makes two Flame Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Constrict.

attacks.name: Flame Spear
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. HitomThe spear magically returns to the salamander's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

attacks.name: Constrict
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Large or smaller creature the salamander can see within 10 feet. Failure: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

traits.name: Fire Aura
traits.text: At the end of each of the salamander's turns, each creature of the salamander's choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the salamander takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Hooves
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the satyr pushes the target up to 10 feet straight away from itself.

attacks.name: Mockery
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the satyr can see within 90 feet. Failure: 5 (1d6 + 2) Psychic damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The satyr has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The scout makes two attacks, using Shortsword and Longbow in any combination.

attacks.name: Shortsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Longbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 150/600 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Death Glare (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one Frightened creature the hag can see within 30 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it drops to 0 Hit Points. Otherwise, the target takes 13 (3d8) Psychic damage.

attacks.name: Illusory Appearance
attacks.detail:
The hag casts Disguise Self, using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13). The spell's duration is 24 hours.
- At Will: Disguise Self

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The hag can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Vile Appearance
traits.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, any Beast or Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag and can see the hag's true form. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this hag's Vile Appearance for 24 hours.

attacks.name: Draining Swipe
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score decreases by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces that score to 0. If a Humanoid is slain by this attack, a Shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shadow Stealth
attacks.detail: While in Dim Light or darkness, the shadow takes the Hide action.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.text: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Sunlight Weakness
traits.text: While in sunlight, the shadow has Disadvantage on D20 Test.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The shambling mound makes three Charged Tendril attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Engulf.

attacks.name: Charged Tendril
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Lightning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the shambling mound pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

attacks.name: Engulf
attacks.detail: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. Failure: The target is pulled into the shambling mound's space and has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it takes 10 (3d6) Lightning damage at the start of each of its turns. When the shambling mound moves, the Grappled target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The shambling mound can have only one creature Grappled by this action at a time.

traits.name: Lightning Absorption
traits.text: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

attacks.name: Fist
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Force damage.

traits.name: Bound
traits.text: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.text: The guardian regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

traits.name: Spell Storing
traits.text: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Cold Breath (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 18 (4d8) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Paralyzing Breath
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. First Failure The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save. Second Failure The target has the Paralyzed condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

attacks.name: Shortsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Shortbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The solar makes two Flying Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Slaying Bow.

attacks.name: Flying Sword
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +15, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. 22 (4d6 + 8) Slashing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage. HitomThe sword magically returns to the solar's hand or hovers within 5 feet of the solar immediately after a ranged attack.

attacks.name: Slaying Bow
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 21, one creature the solar can see within 600 feet. Failure: If the creature has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes 24 (4d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The solar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 25):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good
- 1e/Day Each: Commune, Control Weather, Dispel Evil and Good, Resurrection

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Divine Aid (3/Day)
attacks.detail: The solar casts Cure Wounds (level 2 version), Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Blinding Gaze
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature the solar can see within 120 feet. Failure: The target has the Blinded condition for 1 minute. Failure or Success: The solar can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Radiant Teleport
attacks.detail: The solar teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the solar at its destination space. Failure: 11 (2d10) Radiant damage. Success: Half damage.

traits.name: Divine Awareness
traits.text: The solar knows if it hears a lie.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
traits.text: If the solar dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
traits.text: If the solar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The solar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Life Drain
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, its Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.text: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.text: While in sunlight, the specter has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The sphinx makes three Claw attacks.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Mind-Rending Roar (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 16, each enemy in a 300-foot Emanation originating from the sphinx. Failure: 35 (10d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Incapacitated condition until the start of the sphinx's next turn.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Identify, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion, Prestidigitation
- 1e/Day Each: Dispel Magic, Legend Lore, Locate Object, Plane Shift, Remove Curse, Tongues

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Arcane Prowl
attacks.detail: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Weight of Years
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. Failure: The target gains 1 Exhaustion level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears 3d10 years older. Failure or Success: The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Inscrutable
traits.text: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The sphinx makes two Claw attacks and uses Roar.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. 20 (4d6 + 6) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Roar (3/Day)
attacks.detail:
The sphinx emits a magical roar. Whenever it roars, the roar has a different effect, as detailed below (the sequence resets when it takes a Long Rest):
- First Roar: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 20, each enemy in a 500-foot Emanation originating from the sphinx. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition for 1 minute.
- Second Roar: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 20, each enemy in a 500-foot Emanation originating from the sphinx. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.
- Third Roar: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each enemy in a 500-foot Emanation originating from the sphinx. Failure: 44 (8d10) Thunder damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Thaumaturgy
- 1e/Day Each: Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Greater Restoration, Heroes' Feast, Zone of Truth

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Arcane Prowl
attacks.detail: The sphinx can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and it makes one Claw attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Weight of Years
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the sphinx can see within 120 feet. Failure: The target gains 1 Exhaustion level. While the target has any Exhaustion levels, it appears 3d10 years older. Failure or Success: The sphinx can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Inscrutable
traits.text: No magic can observe the sphinx remotely or detect its thoughts without its permission. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain its intentions or sincerity are made with Disadvantage.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the sphinx fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The naga makes three attacks, using Bite or Necrotic Ray in any combination.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Necrotic Ray
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 60 ft. 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The naga casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Mage Hand, Minor Illusion, Water Breathing
- 2e/Day Each: Detect Thoughts, Dimension Door, Hold Person, Lightning Bolt

traits.name: Fiendish Restoration
traits.text: If it dies, the naga returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its Hit Points. Only a Wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.

attacks.name: Needle Sword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Enchanting Bow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 40/160 ft. 1 Piercing damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the sprite's next turn.

attacks.name: Heart Sight
attacks.detail: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). Failure: The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

attacks.name: Invisibility
attacks.detail:
The sprite casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
- At Will: Invisibility

attacks.name: Shortsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Hand Crossbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 30/120 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Cunning Action
attacks.detail: The spy takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Fire damage.

attacks.name: Steam Breath (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 5 (2d4) Fire damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of the mephit's next turn. Success: Half damage only. Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

traits.name: Blurred Form
traits.text: Attack rolls against the mephit are made with Disadvantage unless the mephit has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Death Burst
traits.text: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Proboscis
attacks.detail:
Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage, and the stirge attaches to the target. While attached, the stirge can't make Proboscis attacks, and the target takes 5 (2d4) Necrotic damage at the start of each of the stirge's turns.
The stirge can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can detach the stirge as an action.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The giant makes two attacks, using Stone Club or Boulder in any combination.

attacks.name: Stone Club
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 15 ft. 22 (3d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Boulder
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 60/240 ft. 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The golem makes two attacks, using Slam or Force Bolt in any combination.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) Force damage.

attacks.name: Force Bolt
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 120 ft. 22 (4d10) Force damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Slow (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The golem casts the Slow spell, requiring no spell components and using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.text: The golem can't shape-shift.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The giant makes two attacks, using Storm Sword or Thunderbolt in any combination.

attacks.name: Storm Sword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. 23 (4d6 + 9) Slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) Lightning damage.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +14, range 500 ft. 22 (2d12 + 9) Lightning damage, and the target has the Blinded and Deafened conditions until the start of the giant's next turn.

attacks.name: Lightning Storm (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cylinder originating from a point the giant can see within 500 feet. Failure: 55 (10d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
- At Will: Detect Magic, Light
- 1/Day Each: Control Weather

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.text: The giant can breathe air and water.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The succubus makes one Fiendish Touch attack and uses Charm or Draining Kiss.

attacks.name: Fiendish Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Psychic damage.

attacks.name: Charm
attacks.detail: The succubus casts Dominate Person (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15).

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature Charmed by the succubus within 5 feet. Failure: 13 (3d8) Psychic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail: The succubus shape-shifts to resemble a Medium or Small Humanoid or back into its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except its Fly Speed is available only in its true form. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

traits.name: Incubus Form
traits.text: When the succubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into an Incubus, using that stat block instead of this one.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The tarrasque makes one Bite attack and three other attacks, using Claw or Tail in any combination.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +19, reach 15 ft. 36 (4d12 + 10) Piercing damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition and can't teleport.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +19, reach 15 ft. 28 (4d8 + 10) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Tail
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +19, reach 30 ft. 23 (3d8 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bellow (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 27, each creature and each object that isn't being worn or carried in a 150-foot Cone. Failure: 78 (12d12) Thunder damage, and the target has the Deafened and Frightened conditions until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Swallow
attacks.detail:
Strength Saving Throw: DC 27, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the tarrasque (it can have up to six creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: The target is swallowed, and the Grappled condition ends. A swallowed creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions and can't teleport, it has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the tarrasque, and it takes 56 (16d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the tarrasque's turns.
If the tarrasque takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the tarrasque must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the tarrasque and has the Prone condition. If the tarrasque dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Onslaught
attacks.detail: The tarrasque moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Claw or Tail attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: World-Shaking Movement
attacks.detail: The tarrasque moves up to its Speed. At the end of this movement, the tarrasque creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 60-foot Emanation originating from itself. Creatures in that area lose Concentration and, if Medium or smaller, have the Prone condition. The tarrasque can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (6/Day)
traits.text: If the tarrasque fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The tarrasque has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Reflective Carapace
traits.text: If the tarrasque is targeted by a Magic Missile spell or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll 1d6. On a 1-5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected and reflects the spell, turning the caster into the target.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The tough makes two attacks, using Warhammer or Heavy Crossbow in any combination.

attacks.name: Warhammer
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 12 (2d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the tough pushes the target up to 10 feet straight away from itself.

attacks.name: Heavy Crossbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 100/400 ft. 13 (2d10 + 2) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The tough has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the tough's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

attacks.name: Mace
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Heavy Crossbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 100/400 ft. 6 (1d10 + 1) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The tough has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the tough's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The treant makes two Slam attacks.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Hail of Bark
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 180 ft. 28 (4d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Animate Trees (1/Day)
attacks.detail: The treant magically animates up to two trees it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same Initiative count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.text: The limb regains 5 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the limb takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the limb's next turn. The limb dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

traits.name: Troll Spawn
traits.text: The limb uncannily has the same senses as a whole troll. If the limb isn't destroyed within 24 hours, roll 1d12. On a 12, the limb turns into a Troll. Otherwise, the limb withers away.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The troll makes three Rend attacks.

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Charge
attacks.detail: The troll moves up to half its Speed straight toward an enemy it can see.

traits.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
traits.text: If the troll ends any turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 Exhaustion level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains Hit Points.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.text: The troll regains 15 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The unicorn makes one Hooves attack and one Radiant Horn attack.

attacks.name: Hooves
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

attacks.name: Radiant Horn
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Radiant damage.

attacks.name: Spellcasting
attacks.detail:
The unicorn casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
- At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Druidcraft
- 1e/Day Each: Calm Emotions, Dispel Evil and Good, Entangle, Pass without Trace, Word of Recall

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Unicorn's Blessing (3/Day)
attacks.detail: The unicorn touches another creature with its horn and casts Cure Wounds or Lesser Restoration on that creature, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Charging Horn
attacks.detail: The unicorn moves up to half its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks, and it makes one Radiant Horn attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Shimmering Shield
attacks.detail: The unicorn targets itself or one creature it can see within 60 feet of itself. The target gains 10 (3d6) Temporary Hit Points, and its AC increases by 2 until the end of the unicorn's next turn. The unicorn can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.text: If the unicorn fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The unicorn has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The familiar makes two Umbral Dagger attacks.

attacks.name: Umbral Dagger
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) Necrotic damage. If the target is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack, the target becomes Stable but has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. While it has the Poisoned condition, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Deathless Agility
attacks.detail: The familiar takes the Dash or Disengage action.

traits.name: Vampiric Connection
traits.text: While the familiar and its vampire master are on the same plane of existence, the vampire can communicate with the familiar telepathically, and the vampire can perceive through the familiar's senses.

attacks.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
attacks.detail: The vampire makes two Grave Strike attacks and uses Bite.

attacks.name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of two hands.

attacks.name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition. Failure: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains Hit Points equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a Vampire Spawn under the vampire's control.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Shape-Shift
attacks.detail:
If the vampire isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a Tiny bat (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.
While in bat form, the vampire can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and Speed, are unchanged.
While in mist form, the vampire can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has Resistance to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Charm (Recharge 5-6)
attacks.detail: The vampire casts Charm Person, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17), and the duration is 24 hours. The Charmed target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the vampire.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Deathless Strike
attacks.detail: The vampire moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Grave Strike attack.

attacks.name: Legendary Action: Beguile
attacks.detail: The vampire casts Command, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17). The vampire can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
traits.text: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Misty Escape
traits.text:
If the vampire drops to 0 Hit Points outside its resting place, the vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.
While it has 0 Hit Points in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the Paralyzed condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Vampire Weakness
traits.text:
The vampire has these weaknesses:
- Forbiddance: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
- Running Water: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.
- Stake to the Heart: If a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the Incapacitated condition in its resting place, the vampire has the Paralyzed condition until the weapon is removed.
- Sunlight: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The vampire makes two Claw attacks and uses Bite.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 8 (2d4 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from one of two claws.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition. Failure: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains Hit Points equal to that amount.

attacks.name: Bonus Action: Deathless Agility
attacks.detail: The vampire takes the Dash or Disengage action.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Vampire Weakness
traits.text:
The vampire has these weaknesses:
- Forbiddance: The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
- Running Water: The vampire takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.
- Stake to the Heart: The vampire is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire has the Incapacitated condition.
- Sunlight: The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The fungus makes two Rotting Touch attacks.

attacks.name: Rotting Touch
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 10 ft. 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The vrock makes two Shred attacks.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

attacks.name: Spores (Recharge 6)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the vrock. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. While Poisoned, the target takes 5 (1d10) Poison damage at the start of each of its turns. Emptying a flask of Holy Water on the target ends the effect early.

attacks.name: Stunning Screech (1/Day)
attacks.detail: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the vrock (demons succeed automatically). Failure: 10 (3d6) Thunder damage, and the target has the Stunned condition until the end of the vrock's next turn.

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the vrock dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The vrock has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attacks.name: Hooves
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the skeleton moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Spear
attacks.detail: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.text: The warrior has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the warrior's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The warrior makes two Greatsword or Heavy Crossbow attacks.

attacks.name: Greatsword
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

attacks.name: Heavy Crossbow
attacks.detail: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 100/400 ft. 12 (2d10 + 1) Piercing damage.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.detail: The elemental makes two Slam attacks.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.detail: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

attacks.name: Whelm (Recharge 4-6)

The elemental can grapple one Large creature or up to two Medium or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm. As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the elemental can pull a creature out of it by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength (Athletics) check. Success: Half damage only.

attacks.name: Swallow
attacks.detail:
The frog swallows a Small or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Cover|XPHB|Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the frog. While swallowing the target, the frog can't use Bite, and if the frog dies, the swallowed target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition.
At the end of the frog's next turn, the swallowed target takes 5 (2d4) Acid damage. If that damage doesn't kill it, the frog disgorges it, causing it to exit Prone.
